description: GoldenTraceRunner.runCiGate always returns passed:true (no regressions) at MVP. The 'actual' fingerprint is set equal to 'expected' with no real pipeline execution. The CI hard-fail gate (R-10.14) is structurally wired but functionally a no-op.
evidence: Line 142: 'const actualFingerprint: Fingerprint = { ...expectedFingerprint }' with comment 'MVP stub: actual fingerprint = expected (no real execution yet). Task 9 replaces this with real pipeline output.'
suggested_action: Wire real pipeline execution in runCiGate (Task 9). Until then, CI is not actually gating on regressions — the gate exists in structure only.

description: Gateway mode:'dry-run' throws a hard Error in production: 'dry-run not supported at MVP. This mode is reserved for Plan 14.' Shadow turns (plan 11) enqueue a pg-boss job that calls the shadow worker which calls simulateShadowExecution() returning null — meaning the candidate pipeline is never actually executed with dry-run semantics. R-11.1 (tool handlers do not execute side effects in shadow) is entirely unverified in the actual pipeline.
evidence: trpc-caller.ts:60-65 'if (mode === 'dry-run') { throw new Error(...) }'. ShadowTurnWorker.processJob calls simulateShadowExecution() returning null (shadow-turn-worker.ts:108).
suggested_action: Implement dry-run execution path in TrpcCallerImpl, or wire a separate shadow turn pipeline that enforces no-side-effect semantics. The seeded adversarial test (§12 acceptance criterion) for shadow side-effect prevention cannot pass while dry-run throws.

description: The §12 acceptance criterion 'Shadow side-effect verification: seeded adversarial test proves no real writes commit under mode:dry-run' has no implementation. The shadow turn worker spec does not contain any test asserting that writes are blocked during a shadow turn. The worker stub always returns null (shadow_errored), so nothing is proven.
evidence: shadow-turn-worker.spec.ts covers: diffScorer.score call, DB row insert, unique shadowTraceId, error swallowing. No test for write-side-effect prevention. Searching for 'dry.run', 'side.effect', 'prevent' in spec returns nothing.
suggested_action: Add seeded adversarial integration test: configure a shadow turn that would normally commit a draft or write; assert it is suppressed. This is a mandatory §12 acceptance criterion.

description: agent_canary_run, agent_canary_query, and agent_golden_trace all carry tenant_id but have no ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY / FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY in the migration. Plan 10 §9 explicitly states cross-tenant canary isolation is 'enforced by RLS + canary-runner identity'. The RLS protection is declared but not applied.
evidence: 0000_initial.sql: only agents.agent_tool_result_cache (line 1832-1833) has ENABLE/FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY. No equivalent statement for agent_canary_run, agent_canary_query, or agent_golden_trace.
suggested_action: Add ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + CREATE POLICY for agent_canary_run, agent_canary_query, and agent_golden_trace in the migration. The CLAUDE.md hard rule 'Every table has tenant_id' + RLS is violated.

description: agent_rollout_config, agent_rollout_event, and agent_shadow_run carry tenant_id but have no ENABLE/FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY in the migration. CLAUDE.md hard rule: 'Every table has tenant_id. No exceptions' paired with RLS enforcement.
evidence: 0000_initial.sql lines 462, 484, 536: tables created with tenant_id columns, no ALTER TABLE...ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY statements found for these tables.
suggested_action: Add RLS enablement and per-tenant policies for all three rollout/shadow tables.

description: EI-7, EI-8, EI-9, EI-10 checks are all static-assertion stubs that unconditionally return passed:true. The code comment reads 'MVP stub: always passes.' These four invariants are therefore not actually audited in CI. The EI audit suite cannot be called zero-failure-gating when 4 of 10 checks are guaranteed green regardless of code state.
evidence: extensibility-invariant-audit.ts line 206: 'MVP stub: always passes. Full implementation requires OTel span schema inspection.' All four _checkEi7/_checkEi8/_checkEi9/_checkEi10 methods return { passed: true, evidence: '...' } unconditionally.
suggested_action: EI-7 should read OTel span attributes from a sample trace and assert tenant_id present. EI-8 should query agent_tenant_budget enforcement. EI-9 should run the module boundary lint. EI-10 should grep for @deprecated. Until real checks run, the CI zero-failure gate has 4 blind spots.

description: None of the plan 10 §8 metrics exist as emit sites: agent_replay_attempted_total, agent_replay_miss_total, agent_golden_trace_count_active, agent_golden_trace_ci_fail_total, agent_canary_run_total, agent_canary_success_rate_rolling, agent_tier_degraded_gauge, agent_scorer_registered_total, agent_confidence_calibration_inversion. The observability infrastructure (gateway-metrics.ts) has no plan-10 entries.
evidence: grep for all plan-10 metric names in agents module TS files returns zero results. Only agent_tool_result_cache and plan-07/12 metrics exist in gateway-metrics.ts.
suggested_action: Add OTEL counter/gauge instruments for all plan 10 §8 metrics. Critical path: agent_canary_success_rate_rolling and agent_tier_degraded_gauge feed the degraded-flag dashboard.

description: None of the plan 11 §8 metrics exist: agent_rollout_version_resolved_total, agent_shadow_run_total, agent_shadow_diff_category_total, agent_shadow_run_queue_depth, agent_rollout_auto_rollback_total, agent_rollout_active_count, agent_rollout_regression_signal. The ROLLOUT:resolve-version, SHADOW:execute, and SHADOW:diff-score spans are also not emitted.
evidence: grep for agent_rollout_*, agent_shadow_* metric names in agents module returns zero results in non-test files.
suggested_action: Add OTEL counters/gauges for plan 11 metrics and emit spans in RolloutResolver.resolveVersion and ShadowExecutor.runShadow.

description: GaMetricsPort is implemented by StubGaMetrics returning 0 for both tenant count and interactive turns/day. The plan 13 §8 metrics agent_readiness_criterion_passed, agent_readiness_ga_ready, agent_readiness_consecutive_windows_met, agent_runbook_dry_run_coverage, agent_cost_reconciliation_divergence_pct, agent_p1_security_incident_count_90d are stub ports with no real backend. StubGaMetrics is wired into production module (agents.module.ts:225-226).
evidence: agents.module.ts:225: 'import { StubGaMetrics } from ./infrastructure/metrics/stub-ga-metrics'. stub-ga-metrics.ts:12-18: getTenantCount returns 0, getInteractiveTurnsPerDay returns 0.
suggested_action: Replace StubGaMetrics with a real adapter. The GA gate criteria (R-13.8: >=3 tenants AND >=1000 turns/day) will always evaluate as failed while this stub is active. Mark as intentional deferral if this is by design for MVP.

description: Named fixtures from plan 10 §11 are missing: fixtures/golden-traces/planner-overdue.ts, taint-bumped-draft.ts, disambiguation-escalation.ts, cross-domain-definitional-clarity.ts; fixtures/canary-queries/full-tier-kpi-query.ts, nano-tier-quick-fact.ts; fixtures/setaGoldenCorpus/ seed set; fixtures/fixture-tenant/seed-data.sql. Only fixtures/scorers/ and fixtures/scale-probe/ exist.
evidence: find /apps/api/src/modules/agents/fixtures -type f lists: iterations/, plans/, scale-probe/, scorers/ only. No golden-traces/, canary-queries/, setaGoldenCorpus/, or fixture-tenant/ directories.
suggested_action: Create the named fixture files specified in §11. The CI gate golden-trace runner relies on active rows in agent_golden_trace table; the seeded fixture data must exist for integration tests to run.

description: Named fixtures from plan 11 §11 are missing: fixtures/rollouts/model-swap-v5-v6.ts, sub-agent-prompt-tweak.ts, router-version-bump.ts; fixtures/shadow-diff-scorer/identical-cases.ts, major-difference-cases.ts.
evidence: No rollouts/ or shadow-diff-scorer/ directories under fixtures/. Only iterations/, plans/, scale-probe/, scorers/.
suggested_action: Create the named rollout and shadow-diff-scorer fixture files per §11 specification.

description: Named fixtures from plan 13 §11 are missing: fixtures/readiness/all-pass-scenario.ts, one-criterion-fails.ts, runbook-coverage-gap.ts, p1-incident-in-window.ts; fixtures/red-team/broken-prompt-planted.ts.
evidence: No readiness/ or red-team/ directories under fixtures/.
suggested_action: Create the named readiness and red-team fixture files per §11 specification.

description: Plan 10 §9 states: 'Accessing replay on a production trace_id requires canDo(agent.replay) — admin-tier role.' No tRPC replay procedure exists (no replay.router.ts). The AGENT_REPLAY permission is not defined in permissions.ts. The replay harness is a service but has no gated interface endpoint.
evidence: find interface/trpc/ lists no replay router file. permissions.ts line 110: AGENT_ROLLOUT_MANAGE, line 113: AGENT_READINESS_READ — no AGENT_REPLAY. The ReplayHarness is injectable but never exposed via a gated tRPC procedure.
suggested_action: Create a replay.router.ts with canDo('agent:replay') permission gate wrapping ReplayHarness.replay(). Add AGENT_REPLAY to permissions.ts.

description: Plan 10 §11 integration tests are missing: 'Full replay round-trip: capture a sampled turn → reconstruct via replay → resulting messages byte-for-byte match LLM send'; 'Drift-scorer fixture: seed trace where tool X called in whenNotToUse context'; 'LLM-judge observe-only test'; 'LLM-judge iterative-gate rejection'; 'Canary rotation test: run rotateQuarterly() twice'. Unit tests for replay and drift-scorer exist but integration tests are not wired.
evidence: No integration spec files found for replay-harness, golden-trace-runner, or canary-query-rotator beyond unit stubs. The integration tests listed in §11 require DB-backed fixture setup that is absent.
suggested_action: Create integration test files with real-DB fixtures for the listed scenarios. These are mandatory per plan §12 acceptance criteria.

description: Plan 11 §11 integration tests missing: 'Shadow side-effect seed: attempt a write during shadow → gateway blocks via mode:dry-run'; 'Auto-rollback: seed error-rate spike → monitor trips → rollback fires'; 'Retry version pinning: async turn with pinned candidate version → pg-boss retry → same version used'; 'Cross-tenant: rollout for tenant A does not affect tenant B routing'; 'Hash isolation: two concurrent rollouts → same tenant does NOT get both candidates'.
evidence: rollout-resolver.spec.ts covers hash determinism (unit). Shadow-executor.spec.ts covers shouldShadow. No integration test for the shadow side-effect gate or cross-tenant isolation.
suggested_action: Implement the missing integration tests listed in plan 11 §11. Auto-rollback and cross-tenant tests are particularly important for §12 acceptance.

description: Plan 10 §3 specifies agent_golden_trace has a 20-row enforcement. The schema has no CHECK constraint enforcing the <=20 active row limit. R-10.11 states this must be 'enforced at row-insert'. The GoldenTraceRepository has no insert-time cap check.
evidence: agents.schema.ts lines 523-555: agent_golden_trace table definition has no constraint limiting active rows to 20. golden-trace.repository.ts domain interface reviewed — no cap enforcement visible.
suggested_action: Add a DB trigger or application-layer check in GoldenTraceRepository.insert() that rejects inserts when active (removed_at IS NULL) count >= 20.

description: R-13.1: every §18 criterion must have a dedicated CriterionEvaluator. §18.5 specifies: golden_trace_ci_gate_enabled, canary_1_5_25_100_automated, shadow_mode_interface_exercised, version_pinning_across_retries_compliance. The rollout-* evaluators exist (rollout-canary-stages, rollout-golden-trace-ci-gate, rollout-shadow-mode-exercised, rollout-version-pinning-compliance) but their underlying metric sources are stubs (StubMetricsQuery). Cannot verify criterion evaluators return correct signals without real metric data.
evidence: StubMetricsQuery (stub-metrics-query.ts) is wired via METRICS_QUERY_PORT in agents.module.ts:225. StubGaMetrics returns 0 for tenant/turn counts.
suggested_action: Replace StubMetricsQuery with a real adapter that reads actual metric values from the observability backend. Until then, criterion results are synthetic.

description: Plan 10 §11 property tests are missing: 'Replay determinism: for a given trace_id, two replay calls return byte-identical output' and 'Fingerprint sorting: expected_tool_calls comparison is order-insensitive'. These are listed as required property tests.
evidence: replay-harness.spec.ts covers 7 unit scenarios. No property-based test for determinism or fingerprint ordering.
suggested_action: Add property tests using a fast-check or similar library. Replay determinism is a correctness guarantee that unit tests alone cannot verify.

description: Plan 11 §11 E2E tests are missing: 'Model swap rollout: create config for model:v5→model:v6, activate 1%, observe dashboards, advance to 100%, complete'; 'Bad candidate auto-rollback: intentionally-regressed candidate, activate 1%, monitor auto-trips within 15min'. No Playwright or E2E test file found.
evidence: No e2e/ directory under agents module. Playwright test directory not found for this plan.
suggested_action: Create E2E tests per §11. The auto-rollback E2E is particularly important for the §12 'Auto-rollback drill' acceptance criterion.

description: Plan 13 §11 E2E tests missing: 'Full quarterly cycle: drill scheduled → executed → logged → coverage gauge updates'; 'Production readiness scenario: start with is_ga_ready:false; over simulated 60+ days, all criteria pass'; 'Scale probe end-to-end against synthetic 12-module fixture'; 'Flow-correlation probe end-to-end'.
evidence: No E2E test files found for plan 13 components.
suggested_action: Create E2E test files. The scale probe E2E is the most actionable: it runs synchronously against in-memory fixtures and does not require external services.

description: QualityCanaryScheduler.tickHourly() records a synthetic canary run with score=1.0 and outcome='passed' as an MVP stub, bypassing actual pipeline execution. The sliding-window health calculations operate on these synthetic rows. Integration tests for the canary (degraded-flag seeding) pass because the stub always inserts passing runs — flipping to 'failed' requires test setup that goes around the scheduler stub.
evidence: quality-canary-scheduler.ts line 75: 'outcome: passed, score: 1.0, durationMs: 100' — MVP stub comment.
suggested_action: Document this as an explicit known-limitation. The degraded-flag integration test in §11 must bypass the stub by directly inserting failed canary run rows rather than relying on tickHourly.

description: LlmJudgeScorer.run() is a stub returning { score: 0, passed: true, reason: 'observe-only' } intentionally. This is the MVP design per §16 Beta gate: LLM-judge activation requires SetaGoldenCorpus >=100 rows AND meta_eval_agreement >=0.95. README confirms this as 'Beta gate: SetaGoldenCorpus >=100 rows + meta-eval >=95%'.
evidence: llm-judge-scorer.ts:96 explicitly documents observe-only. README.md Beta expansions table confirms gate. ScorerRegistry correctly blocks llm-judge registration with scope!=test and no metaEvalAgreement.
suggested_action: No action required at MVP. Track corpus authoring progress (>100 labeled rows) as Beta gate condition.

description: ShadowTurnWorker.simulateShadowExecution() returns null (stub), making all shadow diff scores record as shadow_errored. This is the MVP activation gate per §16: 'MVP for: shadow-mode infrastructure (interface active; first real shadow rollout can happen in Beta)'.
evidence: shadow-turn-worker.ts:108 comment: 'MVP stub for candidate shadow execution. Returns null so the diff scorer categorises the run as shadow_errored. The real execution pipeline will be wired in a later sub-plan.'
suggested_action: Track as Beta activation work. The stub prevents real A/B diff scoring but does not break production flows.

description: StubGaMetrics returning 0 for tenant count and interactive turns/day is an acknowledged MVP stub. The GA gate (R-13.8: >=3 tenants AND >=1000 turns/day) will compute as false, which is the correct state before live tenants exist. This is expected behavior, not a bug.
evidence: stub-ga-metrics.ts comment: 'Replace with a real adapter (Athena / CloudWatch) once the metrics backend is live.'
suggested_action: Ensure replacement is planned before Beta when real tenants onboard. The ga_readiness_state is_ga_ready will remain false until then, which is correct.

description: Plan 10 §11 integration test 'Canary rotation test: run rotateQuarterly() twice (simulated quarters); assert resulting active set is disjoint from prior quarter' is not implemented as an integration test — only unit-level mock tests appear to exist for the rotator.
evidence: canary-query-rotator.spec.ts exists but contents unverified as integration-level. The rotator's rotateQuarterly() correctly calls retireByQuarter and insertBatch, but no test seeds a real DB and verifies the disjoint invariant.
suggested_action: Add an integration test that seeds two quarters of canary queries, runs rotateQuarterly() twice, and verifies the disjoint constraint and status='retired' on old queries.
